---
title-block-banner: ./assets/img/lab_picture_250602_small.jpg
title: Meet the team
title-block-banner-color: white

listing: 
- id: team-preview
  type: grid
  contents: 
    - "team/*.qmd"
  fields: [title, categories, date, image, email, orcid, labdate]
  field-display-names:
    labdate: "Since"
  sort: 
    - "rank asc"
    - "title asc"
  #image-height: "100%"
  exclude: 
    categories: past
  grid-columns: 4

- id: past-preview
  type: table
  contents: 
    - "team/*.qmd"
  fields: [alumni_name, role, labdate]
  field-display-names:
    alumni_name: "Alumni Name"
    role: "Position in the Lab"
    labdate: " "
  sort: 
    - "rank asc"
    - "title asc"
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: false
  #image-height: "100%"
  exclude: 
    categories: current
  grid-columns: 4
  
toc: false

format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        /* 1. Page Header Banner Styling */
        .quarto-title-block .quarto-title-banner {
          height: 350px;             
          background-size: cover;    
          background-position: center bottom 65%; 
        }
        
        /* 2. FORCE CARD AND COLUMN WIDTH REDUCTION */
        /* We must target the Bootstrap grid column classes directly to shrink them */
        #team-preview [class*="g-col-"],
        #team-preview .quarto-grid-item,
        #team-preview .card {
          width: 140px !important;      /* Forces the entire card shell to stay narrow */
          max-width: 140px !important;  
          margin-right: auto !important;          
          margin-left: auto !important;
        }

        /* 3. SHAPE THE IMAGE CONTAINER */
        #team-preview .quarto-grid-item .card-img-top {
          height: 180px !important;     /* A 180px height perfectly scales your 3:4 portrait photo */
          max-height: 180px !important;
          width: 100% !important;       
          max-width: 100% !important;
          margin-bottom: 0 !important;         
          background-color: #ffffff !important;
          display: flex !important;
          align-items: center !important;
          justify-content: center !important;
          overflow: hidden !important;
        }
        
        /* 4. FORCE THE IMAGE TO SHRINK WITHOUT CROPPING */
        #team-preview .quarto-grid-item p.card-img-top img.thumbnail-image,
        #team-preview .quarto-grid-item img.card-img {
          height: 100% !important;      /* Lock height to the container */
          width: 100% !important;       /* Lock width to the container */
          max-height: 180px !important;
          max-width: 140px !important;
          object-fit: contain !important; /* Forces the whole 572x746 image to scale down */
          background-color: #ffffff !important; 
          object-position: center !important;   
          display: block !important;
        }  

        /* 5. Card UI Layout Tweaks */
        #team-preview .card {
          background-color: #ffffff !important;
          border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.08) !important;
        }
        
        #team-preview .card-body {
          padding: 0.5rem !important;
          text-align: center !important; 
        }
        </style>
---

:::{ #team-preview }
:::



:::{ #past-preview }
:::
